global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to engage with the game and take advantage of an offer.

elements.label: VoxelRealm logo
elements.description: A stylized logo featuring the text 'VoxelRealm' in a bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Game interface screenshot
elements.description: A screenshot of a game interface showing a grid layout with empty slots, suggesting a puzzle or matching game.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Level up today' in a large, bold font, centered at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: The text 'Play with friends tonight' in a smaller font, placed directly below the headline.

elements.label: Right arrow icon
elements.description: A simple right arrow icon, indicating navigation or progression, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon, possibly representing a game feature, located near the top center.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon, similar to the previous one, positioned slightly to the left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer' in a bold font, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Small circular icon
elements.description: A third small circular icon, positioned below the previous icons, maintaining the same style.

elements.label: Background color
elements.description: A solid green background that fills the entire ad space, providing a vibrant and playful atmosphere.
elements.text_content: Level up today Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Game title text
elements.description: The text 'VoxelRealm' in a bold, eye-catching font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Offer button text
elements.description: The text 'Get offer' in a clear, bold font, located at the bottom of the ad, encouraging user action.
